subcodes.title: Ziyarat-Namiy-i-Bayt (Lawh-i-Hajj Baghdad)
subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Great Scene! Hearken unto the call of the Ancient Beauty from the direction of His Most Great Prison [3.5s]... ...When thou art departed out of the court of My presence, O Muḥammad, direct thy steps towards My House (Baghdád House), and visit it on behalf of thy Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی المنظر الاکبر اسمع ندآء جمال القدم من شطر سجنه الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
